title: campium minutulum
intro: Campium minutulum, also known as the minute campion or small campion, is a small flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and heal wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections such as coughs and colds. Campium minutulum is typically harvested for its leaves and flowers, which are used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves.
